name: Lemon Cream Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated before adding the next.
3. Stir in the grated lemon rind and vanilla extract.
4. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and baking soda) alternately with the sour cream until just combined. The batter will be thick.
5. Divide the batter evenly among greased or paper-lined muffin cups, filling each about ¾ full.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cupcakes to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring them to wire racks to cool completely.
8. For the frosting, cream the butter and powdered sugar in a small mixing bowl until smooth.
9. Add the lemon juice, vanilla extract, grated lemon rind, and milk; beat until well combined.
10. Frost the cooled cupcakes as desired.
